description: Create a content slide on competition for deals from Chinese investors with a two-column layout, featuring a vertical bar chart of 2019 vs. 2018 expectations on the left and commentary bullets on the right.

header.kicker: 3 Competitive dynamics and the private equity business model
header.headline: Competition for deals from Chinese strategic and financial investors is not expected to increase further in 2019
header.sub: Increasing competition from Chinese investors – 2019 vs. 2018 [%]

left.title: "Do you expect increasing competition for deals from Chinese strategic and financial investors in 2019?"

items.text: Most surveyed PE professionals expect stability in competition from Chinese investors – Only 28% of respondents (vs. 42% in 2018) expect a further increase in competition for deals from Chinese investors this year

This is not surprising given increasing regulatory hurdles in Europe (e.g., further tightening of the foreign trade ordinance by lowering the intervention threshold from 25% to 10% in Germany) as well as increasing selectivity among Chinese investors
